topic: Neptune r5d Instance Type Family and Lookup Cache Feature

  entities:

    Neptune|Software
    lookup-cache feature|Product
    r5d instance type|Product
    r5 instance type|Product
    NVMe-attached EBS volume|Product
    r5d family|Product
    r5 family|Product

  proposition: [Neptune has a lookup-cache feature.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    Neptune|HAS_FEATURE|lookup-cache feature

    entity-attributes:

  proposition: [The lookup-cache feature can be used to improve the performance of queries which need to fetch and return large numbers of property values and literals.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    lookup-cache feature|PURPOSE|improve performance of queries fetching and returning large numbers of property values and literals

  proposition: [The lookup-cache feature is used primarily by customers with queries that need to return many attributes.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    lookup-cache feature|PRIMARY_USERS|customers with queries that need to return many attributes

  proposition: [The lookup cache boosts performance of queries by fetching attribute values locally rather than looking up each one over and over in Neptune indexed storage.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    lookup-cache feature|MECHANISM|fetching attribute values locally rather than looking up each one in Neptune indexed storage

  proposition: [The lookup cache is implemented using a NVMe-attached EBS volume on an `r5d` instance type.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    lookup-cache feature|IMPLEMENTED_USING|NVMe-attached EBS volume
    NVMe-attached EBS volume|HOSTED_ON|r5d instance type

    entity-attributes:

  proposition: [The lookup cache is enabled using a cluster's parameter group.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    lookup-cache feature|ENABLED_BY|cluster's parameter group

  proposition: [As data is fetched from Neptune indexed storage, property values and RDF literals are cached within the NVMe volume.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    NVMe-attached EBS volume|STORES|property values and RDF literals

  proposition: [The `r5d` instance type is a Neptune instance type.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    r5d instance type|PART_OF|Neptune

    entity-attributes:
    r5d instance type|CLASSIFICATION|Neptune instance type

  proposition: [The `r5` instance type is a Neptune instance type.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    r5 instance type|PART_OF|Neptune

    entity-attributes:
    r5 instance type|CLASSIFICATION|Neptune instance type

  proposition: [If the lookup cache feature is not needed, a standard `r5` instance type should be used rather than an `r5d` instance type.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r5 instance type|RECOMMENDED_WHEN|lookup cache feature is not needed

  proposition: [Using an `r5` instance type rather than an `r5d` instance type avoids the higher cost of the `r5d`.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r5d instance type|COST|higher than r5 instance type

  proposition: [The `r5d` family has instance types in the same sizes as the `r5` family.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    r5d family|SAME_SIZES_AS|r5 family

    entity-attributes:

  proposition: [The `r5d` family ranges in size from `r5d.large` to `r5d.24xlarge`.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r5d family|SIZE_RANGE|r5d.large to r5d.24xlarge

  proposition: [The `r5` family ranges in size from `r5.large` to `r5.24xlarge`.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    r5 family|SIZE_RANGE|r5.large to r5.24xlarge
